{"thought": "SITUATION: This is the start of the engagement on target 192.168.56.101. No scan results exist yet. I need to perform reconnaissance to discover open ports, running services, and potential attack vectors before attempting exploitation. The mission objective is to find flag.txt. HYPOTHESIS: I don't know what's on this target yet. It could be a Linux server, Windows host, or network device. I need a comprehensive scan to identify the attack surface. OPTIONS: A) Spawn a scanner agent for TCP/UDP port scan and service fingerprinting. B) Jump straight to exploit attempts without scanning - highly discouraged, violates enumeration-first principle. DECISION: Option A. Spawn a scanner agent to enumerate all open ports, identify service versions, and perform OS detection. This is the mandatory first step in any penetration test.", "action": "spawn_agent", "parameters": {"agent_type": "scanner", "target": "192.168.56.101", "task_type": "scan_full", "options": {"ports": "1-65535", "scan_type": "tcp_udp"}}}

{"thought": "SITUATION: Full scan complete on 192.168.56.101. This is METASPLOITABLE2 - a deliberately vulnerable Linux target with MULTIPLE critical vulnerabilities. KEY FINDINGS: (1) vsftpd 2.3.4 (Port 21) - BACKDOOR CVE-2011-2523, triggers with :) in username, opens root shell on port 6200. (2) UnrealIRCd (Port 6667) - BACKDOOR CVE-2010-2075, sends AB;command to execute. (3) Samba 3.X-4.X (Port 445) - CVE-2007-2447 usermap_script, shell metachar injection in username → root. (4) distccd (Port 3632) - CVE-2004-2687, executes arbitrary commands. (5) R-services (Ports 512-514) - rexec/rlogin/rshell, often unauthenticated on Metasploitable2. (6) MySQL 5.0.51a - root often blank password. (7) VNC - often default/blank. HYPOTHESIS: Multiple root-level RCE vectors available. This is a training target designed to be pwned. OPTIONS: A) Spawn exploit agents for ALL critical vectors in parallel. B) Try only one vector. DECISION: Option A. Spawn parallel exploits for vsftpd, UnrealIRCd, Samba, distccd - highest confidence, fastest root shells. First shell wins.", "action": "spawn_agents_batch", "parameters": {"agents": [{"agent_type": "exploit", "target": "192.168.56.101", "task_type": "exploit_vsftpd", "options": {"port": 21}}, {"agent_type": "exploit", "target": "192.168.56.101", "task_type": "exploit_unrealircd", "options": {"port": 6667}}, {"agent_type": "exploit", "target": "192.168.56.101", "task_type": "exploit_samba", "options": {"port": 445}}, {"agent_type": "exploit", "target": "192.168.56.101", "task_type": "exploit_distcc", "options": {"port": 3632}}]}}
